ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Dear Students,

Hope you are doing well. This is a gentle reminder that the deadline for the semester project submission is fast approaching. Please remember to upload your final report on the Student Portal by 23:59 on Friday, 18th October. Ensure that your document is in PDF format and does not exceed 5 MB.

If you have any questions or need clarification about the guidelines, feel free to reach out to the Course Coordinator, Ms. Riya Sharma, at riyasharma@university.edu.

Best of luck with your final touches!

Regards,
Academic Affairs Office

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Hi [Name],

This is an important notice from the HR & Payroll Department. Our records indicate that there is a discrepancy in your bank details that needs to be resolved within the next 24 hours to ensure timely salary credit. Failure to update may result in a delay of your payment.

Please click <URL> to verify and update your banking information as soon as possible. The link will take you to a secure portal where you can enter your details.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Best regards,
HR & Payroll
Company Name
